project.description: Metadata for one Read the Docs project: language, homepage, repository, and default version.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

project.description: Read the Docs project slug, such as requests.

default_version.description: Default docs version, such as latest or stable; null when unset.

docs_url.description: URL of the hosted documentation; null when unset.

homepage.description: Project homepage URL; null when unset.

repository.description: Source repository URL; null when unset.

project.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to read documentation content; use search.
project.when_to_use: Use this to confirm a project slug exists and find its docs homepage before searching.

search.description: Server-side full-text search inside a specific project's documentation on Read the Docs.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

project.description: Read the Docs project slug, usually the package name, such as requests or flask.

output_schema.description: Documentation search results within one project.

items.description: Matching documentation pages, best match first.

domain.description: Docs domain hosting the page, such as https://requests.readthedocs.io.

first_match.description: Content of the best-matching section on the page; null when unavailable.

url_path.description: Path of the page on the project's docs domain.

total.description: Total matching pages reported by Read the Docs.

pagination.behavior: Returns Read the Docs' first page of results (up to 50 pages).

search.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for web platform docs; use mdn. The project slug must be known (usually the package name).
search.when_to_use: Use this to find how-to content inside a library's docs, such as timeouts in requests or blueprints in flask.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.

result.truncation: Declared result bounds and pagination are reported explicitly.
